steps.title: Supply a finite verb
steps.content: The second clause is "the building itself ______ us the most." It needs a finite main verb, and the surrounding past-tense context points to a completed past action.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is a present participle, Choice C is a perfect participle, and Choice D is an infinitive. None can serve by itself as the main verb of the independent clause. The simple past-tense verb completes the clause and matches the sentence's time frame. The answer is A.
